title: lippia baumii var. nyassensis
intro: Lippia baumii var. nyassensis, also known as Nyasaland lippia, is a plant species belonging to the family Verbenaceae. It is a shrub native to Africa, valued for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant is used to treat various ailments, including fever, malaria, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Lippia baumii var. nyassensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to relieve symptoms, promote recovery, and support overall well-being.
